meaning: n.<德>盖世太保,纳粹秘密警察
examples: He signs the letter, and then he writes underneath it, "The Gestapo has not harmed me in any way."
She was seized on a Milan station platform by two Gestapo agents.
The Times talks of a French "Gestapo", The Daily Mail said a "system of deportation" was at work.
He was arrested by the Gestapo and later sent to the Buchenwald and Dora concentration camps.
After months of manual labour, our hero lands in the attic of a bombed-out Gestapo building.
